parameters.query: DELETE FROM content_cache WHERE expires_at IS NOT NULL AND expires_at < NOW();

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM content_cache) as cache_rows, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM content_variants) as variant_rows, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pipeline_queue WHERE status = 'done') as done_jobs, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pipeline_queue WHERE status = 'failed') as failed_jobs;

parameters.content:
## SIGNAL CLEANUP

Daily at 5:00 AM:
1. DELETE expired cache entries (cascades to variants)
2. Delete transcript files older than 14 days
3. Report stats

parameters.query: SELECT pq.id, pq.response_text, pq.sender, pu.signal_uuid FROM pipeline_queue pq JOIN pipeline_users pu ON pq.sender = pu.id WHERE pq.response_sent = FALSE AND pq.response_text IS NOT NULL AND pq.status = 'done' ORDER BY pq.created_at;
UPDATE pipeline_queue SET response_sent = TRUE WHERE response_sent = FALSE AND response_text IS NOT NULL AND status = 'done';
DELETE FROM content_cache WHERE expires_at IS NOT NULL AND expires_at < NOW();

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM content_cache) as cache_rows, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM content_variants) as variant_rows, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pipeline_queue WHERE status = 'done') as done_jobs, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pipeline_queue WHERE status = 'failed') as failed_jobs;

parameters.content:
## SIGNAL CLEANUP

Daily at 5:00 AM:
1. DELETE expired cache entries (cascades to variants)
2. Delete transcript files older than 14 days
3. Report stats

parameters.query: SELECT pq.id, pq.response_text, pq.sender, pu.signal_uuid FROM pipeline_queue pq JOIN pipeline_users pu ON pq.sender = pu.id WHERE pq.response_sent = FALSE AND pq.response_text IS NOT NULL AND pq.status = 'done' ORDER BY pq.created_at;
UPDATE pipeline_queue SET response_sent = TRUE WHERE response_sent = FALSE AND response_text IS NOT NULL AND status = 'done';
